html:
GitHub Scout: Agent 架構觀測報告（2026-06-22）

主題

Agent 架構（runtime orchestration / state / HITL）

專案觀測摘要

langchain-ai/langgraph（35,387★）

  • runtime_model: directed graph with interrupt-point HITL（LangGraph v1.0 GA interrupt() API）
  • state_strategy: checkpoint 持久化 + reducer 邏輯 + time-travel replay（任意步重跑）
  • human_review_model: interrupt-point 同步短延遲，breakpoint 暫停等待人工 approve/edit
  • REST 2026-06-22: stargazers_count=35387, pushed_at=2026-06-21

openai/openai-agents-python（27,309★）

  • runtime_model: handoff-based，explicit handoff() 呼叫，RunState 追蹤委派鏈
  • state_strategy: RunState per-agent，handoff 傳遞上下文
  • human_review_model: handoff-based async medium，HITL 以 approval callback 注入
  • REST 2026-06-22: stargazers_count=27309, pushed_at=2026-06-22

microsoft/agent-framework（11,529★）

  • runtime_model: A2A protocol + Conductor YAML gate（Python + .NET 雙語）
  • state_strategy: checkpoint + time-travel debugging（AutoGen + Semantic Kernel 統一）
  • human_review_model: Conductor YAML gate，human_gate step 宣告式暫停點
  • REST 2026-06-22: stargazers_count=11529, pushed_at=2026-06-20

改進提案

專案提案優先級狀態
langchain-ai/langgraphautonomous-harness interrupt_point 補 v1.0 GA 35.4k★ 標注P1implemented
openai/openai-agents-pythonhandoff_based star count 更新至 27.3kP1implemented
langchain-ai/langgraphSKILL.md triggers 補 time-travel debugging/checkpoint replay/Conductor YAML gateP1implemented
microsoft/agent-frameworkPE handoff metadata schema 落地（runner.py 可選輸出）P1plan_ready

審查結論

  • 3 個低風險提案直接落實（config annotation + SKILL.md triggers）
  • 1 個高風險提案輸出計畫至 docs/plans/github-scout-pe-handoff-metadata-20260622.md
  • 全部提案 feasibility_score ≥ 7 且 stability_score ≥ 7

已落實項目

  1. config/autonomous-harness.yaml line 149：interrupt_point.source_framework 補 LangGraph v1.0 GA 35.4k★
  2. config/autonomous-harness.yaml line 168：handoff_based.source_framework 更新至 27.3k REST 2026-06-22
  3. skills/github-scout/SKILL.md：triggers 新增 time-travel debugging/checkpoint replay/Conductor YAML gate/agent-framework orchestration

待人工審核項目

  • docs/plans/github-scout-pe-handoff-metadata-20260622.md：PE handoff metadata schema Step 3-4（runner.py + PS1）需人工確認後落實
